name: PHASE-36 C3 (STEP B, e2e): the REAL delete path apiServer.deleteProject DENIES deleting the ACTIVE project (CANNOT_DELETE_ACTIVE, directory survives); deleting an inactive project SUCCEEDS (directory removed)
_phase36_note: Gate #10 discipline: drives the real /api/projects/{create,activate,delete} endpoints (apiServer.deleteProject — the path that actually fs.delete_dir's the project), NOT the unused project.delete tool. create A; create + activate B; delete B → CANNOT_DELETE_ACTIVE and B's dir still on disk; delete A (inactive) → ok/deleted and A's dir gone. Negative control (run + revert during this stage): removing the B1 endpoint guard makes B's dir get deleted → this scenario FAILS — proving it tests the real path.
